title: Method for manufacturing semiconductor device
abstract: A change in electrical characteristics of a semiconductor device including an oxide semiconductor is prevented, and the reliability of the semiconductor device is improved. An oxide semiconductor is formed over a substrate; an insulator is formed over the oxide semiconductor; a metal oxide is formed over the insulator; a conductor is formed over the metal oxide; a portion of the oxide semiconductor is exposed by removing the conductor, the metal oxide, and the insulator over the oxide semiconductor; plasma treatment is performed on a surface of the exposed portion of the oxide semiconductor; and a nitride insulator is formed over the exposed portion of the oxide semiconductor and over the conductor. The plasma treatment is performed in a mixed atmosphere of an argon gas and a nitrogen gas.
claims:
Claims 1. A method for manufacturing a semiconductor device, comprising the steps of: forming an oxide semiconductor film over a substrate; forming an insulating film over the oxide semiconductor film; forming a metal oxide film over the insulating film; forming a conductive film over the metal oxide film; exposing a portion of the oxide semiconductor film by removing a portion of the conductive film, the metal oxide film, and the insulating film over the oxide semiconductor film; performing plasma treatment on a surface of the exposed portion of the oxide semiconductor film; and forming a nitride insulating film over the exposed portion of the oxide semiconductor film and over the conductive film, wherein the plasma treatment is performed in a mixed atmosphere comprising an argon gas and a nitrogen gas. 2. The method for manufacturing a semiconductor device according to claim 1, wherein the plasma treatment is performed at a temperature higher than or equal to 150 Â°C and lower than 300 Â°C. 3. The method for manufacturing a semiconductor device according to claim 1, wherein the formation of the nitride insulating film is performed at a temperature higher than or equal to 150 Â°C and lower than 300 Â°C. 4. The method for manufacturing a semiconductor device according to claim 1, wherein the plasma treatment and the formation of the nitride insulating film are successively performed using a plasma-enhanced chemical vapor deposition apparatus. 5. The method for manufacturing a semiconductor device according to claim 1, wherein the metal oxide film functions as a gate insulator. 6. The method for manufacturing a semiconductor device according to claim 1, wherein the metal oxide film functions as a gate electrode. 7. A method for manufacturing an electronic device, 

 wherein the electronic device comprises a semiconductor device, an antenna, a battery, an operation key, or a housing, and wherein the semiconductor device is manufactured by the method for manufacturing a semiconductor device according to claim 1. 8. A transistor comprising: an oxide semiconductor film over a substrate; an insulating film over the oxide semiconductor film; a metal oxide film over the insulating film; and a nitride insulating film over the oxide semiconductor film, the insulating film, and the metal oxide film, wherein a channel length of the transistor is more than or equal to 0.2 Î¼ÏÎ¹ and less than 1.5 Î¼ÏÎ¹, wherein a thickness of the insulating film is more than or equal to 10 nm and less than 200 nm, and wherein a dielectric strength of the transistor is more than or equal to 8.0 x 10 6 V/cm. 9. The transistor according to claim 8, wherein the channel length is more than or equal to 0.5 Î¼ÏÎ¹ and less than 1.0 Î¼ÏÎ¹. 10. The transistor according to claim 8, wherein the thickness of the insulating film is more than or equal to 20 nm and less than 150 nm.
